ruleToc.chapterList:
<js>
base = baseUrl;
id = baseUrl.match(/(\d+\/)/)[1]
java.put("id",id)
lis = java.getElements('#list-chapterAll@dd');
var list = [];

for (var i = 0; i < lis.length; i++) {
     var href = lis[i].select('a').attr('href');
     var text = lis[i].text();
     if (href==0) {
        if ( i < lis.length - 1 ) {
            var url = "https://www.baidu.com/" + id + lis[i + 1].select('a').attr('href');         
        } else {
            var url = "https://cn.bing.com/" + id + lis[i - 1].select('a').attr('href');
        }
     } else { var url = base + href; }
     java.log(lis[i].text()+":"+url);
     list.push({"text": text, "href": url});
}

list
</js>

<js>

for(i in lis){
	surl=lis[i].attr('href')
	if(surl!=''){

			"surl":surl
			}
			list.push(temp)
		}
		surl=''
	}
	//java.log(JSON.stringify(list))
	list
</js>

ruleContent.nextContentUrl:
<js>
(function(){
    // 使用正则检测分页标签
    const hasNextLink = /<a\s+rel=\"next\"\s+class=\"next\"[^>]*>下—页<\/a>/i.test(result);
    if (!hasNextLink) return '';
    
    try {
        // 动态生成分页URL（适配数字型URL）
        let url = baseUrl;
        const pageMatch = url.match(/(\d+)(?:_(\d+))?\.html$/);
        if (!pageMatch) return '';
        
        const [_, baseId, currentPage] = pageMatch;
        const pageNum = currentPage ? parseInt(currentPage) : 1;
        
        // 安全限制（最大3页）
        if (pageNum > 2) return ''; // 第3页后停止
        
        // 生成新URL（如 /123_2.html → /123_3.html）
        return url.replace(/(\d+)(?:_(\d+))?\.html$/, `${baseId}_${pageNum + 1}.html`);
    } catch(e) {
        return '';
    }
})()
</js>

ruleToc.chapterList:
<js>
 var bookId=baseUrl.match(/(\d+)/)[1]
 result=java.ajax("https://wxapp.qidian.com/api/book/categoryV2?bookId="+bookId+"&_csrfToken=")
 var charts=[];
JSON.parse(result).data.vs.map(i=>{
i.cs.map(o=>{
var chart={"id":o.id,"title":o.cN,"v":o.sS==0,"t":o.uT+ "  " + o.cnt +"字"}
if(chart.v){
chart.url="http://qd.yyhydb-123546.top/api/content/qd?bid="+bookId+"&cid="+o.id+"&ver=1&deviceId="+java.androidId()
}else{
chart.url="https://m.qidian.com/chapter/"+bookId+"/"+o.id+"/"
}
charts.push(chart);
})
})
 charts;
</js>

function formatSeconds(value) { 
var theTime = parseInt(value);// 秒 
var theTime1 = 0;// 分 
var theTime2 = 0;// 小时 
if(theTime > 60) { 
theTime1 = parseInt(theTime/60); 
theTime = parseInt(theTime%60); 
if(theTime1 > 60) { 
theTime2 = parseInt(theTime1/60); 
theTime1 = parseInt(theTime1%60); } } 
var result = ""+parseInt(theTime)+"秒"; 
if(theTime1 > 0) { 
result = ""+parseInt(theTime1)+"分"+result; } 
if(theTime2 > 0) { 
result = ""+parseInt(theTime2)+"小时"+result; } 
return result; } 
if(jm.length>1){
key="S3VqaWFuZ0FwcDc0NzYwNQ==";
iv=jm[0];
data=jm[1];
var javaImport = new JavaImporter();
javaImport.importPackage(
    Packages.java.lang,
    Packages.java.io,
    Packages.java.util,
    Packages.java.util.zip
);
with(javaImport) {
    function decode(content) {
        decode = Base64.getDecoder().decode(String(content));
             byteArrayOutputStream = new ByteArrayOutputStream();

            gZIPInputStream = new GZIPInputStream(byteArrayInputStream);
            bArr = String(" ").getBytes(); 
            while (true) {
                read = gZIPInputStream.read(bArr);
                if (read > 0) {
                    byteArrayOutputStream.write(bArr, 0, read);
                } else {
                    gZIPInputStream.close();
                    byteArrayInputStream.close();
                    byteArrayOutputStream.close();
                    return byteArrayOutputStream.toString();
                }
          }
    }
}

ruleToc.chapterList:
<js>
  var bookId=baseUrl.match(/(\d+)/)[1]
 result=java.ajax("https://wxapp.qidian.com/api/book/categoryV2?bookId="+bookId+"&_csrfToken=")
 var charts=[];
JSON.parse(result).data.vs.map(i=>{
i.cs.map(o=>{
var chart={"id":o.id,"title":o.cN,"v":o.sS==0,"t":o.uT+ "  " + o.cnt +"字"}
if(chart.v){
chart.url="http://qd.yyhydb-123546.top/api/content/qd?bid="+bookId+"&cid="+o.id+"&deviceId="+java.androidId()
}else{
chart.url="https://m.qidian.com/chapter/"+bookId+"/"+o.id+"/"
}
charts.push(chart);
})
})
 charts;
</js>

<js>
gender=baseUrl.match(/gender=(\d+)/)?baseUrl.match(/gender=(\d+)/)[1]:""
category_id=baseUrl.match(/category_id=(\d+)/)?baseUrl.match(/category_id=(\d+)/)[1]:""
need_filters=baseUrl.match(/need_filters=(\d+)/)?baseUrl.match(/need_filters=(\d+)/)[1]:""
page=baseUrl.match(/page=(\d+)/)?baseUrl.match(/page=(\d+)/)[1]:""
need_category=baseUrl.match(/need_category=(\d+)/)?baseUrl.match(/need_category=(\d+)/)[1]:""
tag_id=baseUrl.match(/tag_id=(\d+)/)?baseUrl.match(/tag_id=(\d+)/)[1]:""
sign_key='d3dGiJc651gSQ8w1'
headers={'app-version':'51110','platform':'android','reg':'0','AUTHORIZATION':'','application-id':'com.****.reader','net-env':'1','channel':'unknown','qm-params':''}
headers['sign']=String(java.md5Encode(Object.keys(headers).sort().reduce((pre,n)=>pre+n+'='+headers[n],'')+sign_key))


var urlEncode = function (param, key, encode) {
  if(param==null) return '';
  var paramStr = '';
  var t = typeof (param);
  if (t == 'string' || t == 'number' || t == 'boolean') {
    paramStr += '&' + key + '=' + ((encode==null||encode) ? encodeURIComponent(param) : param);
  } else {
    for (var i in param) {
      var k = key == null ? i : key + (param instanceof Array ? '[' + i + ']' : '.' + i);
      paramStr += urlEncode(param[i], k, encode);
    }
  }
  return paramStr;
};

var category = function () {
  params={'gender':gender,'category_id':category_id,'need_filters':need_filters,'page':page,'need_category':need_category}
  params['sign']=String(java.md5Encode(Object.keys(params).sort().reduce((pre,n)=>pre+n+'='+params[n],'')+sign_key))
  url="https://api-bc.wtzw.com/api/v4/category/get-list?"+urlEncode(params)
  return java.ajax(url+','+java.put("headers",JSON.stringify({"headers":headers})))
};

var tag = function () {
  params={'gender':gender,'need_filters':need_filters,'page':page,'tag_id':tag_id}
  params['sign']=String(java.md5Encode(Object.keys(params).sort().reduce((pre,n)=>pre+n+'='+params[n],'')+sign_key))
  url="https://api-bc.wtzw.com/api/v4/tag/index?"+urlEncode(params)
  return java.ajax(url+','+java.put("headers",JSON.stringify({"headers":headers})))
};


if(baseUrl.match(/category/)){
  category()
}else {
  tag()
}
</js>

<js>
const sign_key = "d3dGiJc651gSQ8w1";
const action = "https://api-ks.wenxueapp.com/api/v1/chapter/chapter-list?";
var book_id = {{$.id}};

params = {
    "id": book_id
};

var urlEncode = function(param, key, encode) {
    if (param == null) return "";
    var paramStr = "";
    var t = typeof(param);
    if (t == "string" || t == "number" || t == "boolean") {
        paramStr += "&" + key + "=" + ((encode == null || encode) ? encodeURIComponent(param) : param);
    } else {
        for (var i in param) {
            var k = key == null ? i : key + (param instanceof Array ? "[" + i + "]" : "." + i);
            paramStr += urlEncode(param[i], k, encode);
        }
    }
    return paramStr;
};

var paramSign = String(java.md5Encode(
    Object.keys(params).sort().reduce((pre, n) => pre + n + "=" + params[n], "") + sign_key
));

params["sign"] = paramSign;

var cheaper_url = action + urlEncode(params) + "," + java.get("headers")

cheaper_url

ruleContent.content:
<js>
var javaImporter = new JavaImporter();
javaImporter.importPackage(
    Packages.java.lang,
    Packages.javax.crypto.spec,
    Packages.javax.crypto,
    Packages.java.util
);
with (javaImporter) {
    function decode(content) {
        var ivEncryptedData = Base64.getDecoder().decode(String(content));
        var secretKey = SecretKeySpec(String("242ccb8230d709e1").getBytes(), "AES");
        var ivParameter = IvParameterSpec(Arrays.copyOfRange(ivEncryptedData, 0, 16));
        var cipher = Cipher.getInstance("AES/CBC/PKCS5Padding");
        cipher.init(2, secretKey, ivParameter);
        return String(cipher.doFinal(Arrays.copyOfRange(ivEncryptedData, 16, ivEncryptedData.length)));
    }
}

const signKey = "d3dGiJc651gSQ8w1";

var params = {
    "id": String(java.get("bid")),
    "chapterId": String(baseUrl.split("/").pop())
};

var urlEncode = function(param, key, encode) {
    if (param == null) return "";
    var paramStr = "";
    var paramType = typeof param;
    if (paramType == "string" || paramType == "number" || paramType == "boolean") {
        paramStr += "&" + key + "=" + ((encode == null || encode) ? encodeURIComponent(param) : param);
    } else {
        for (var keyName in param) {
            var newKey = key == null ? keyName : key + (param instanceof Array ? "[" + keyName + "]" : "." + keyName);
            paramStr += urlEncode(param[keyName], newKey, encode);
        }
    }
    return paramStr;
};

paramSign = String(java.md5Encode(
    Object.keys(params).sort().reduce((accumulator, current) => accumulator + current + "=" + params[current], "") + signKey
));
params["sign"] = paramSign;
requestUrl = "https://api-ks.wenxueapp.com/api/v1/chapter/content?" + urlEncode(params);
decode(JSON.parse(java.ajax(requestUrl + "," + java.get("headers"))).data.content)
</js>

if (/No message|404/.test(src)){
	const host="https://m.kepub.net";
	const page=java.get('page');
	const key=java.get('key');
	const results=[
		`${host}/searchBookByPage?page=${page}&keyword=${key}`,
		`${host}/searchCopyrightBookByPage?page=${page}&keyword=${key}`
	].flatMap(url=>{
		const response=java.ajax(url);
		const {data}=JSON.parse(response);
		return data
	});
	java.t2s(JSON.stringify(results))
}else{
	result=src
}
</js>

snk = snk.toUpperCase();

url=`https://api.ieasou.com/api/bookapp/chargeChapter.m?a=1&autoBuy=0&cid=eef_easou_book&vm=5.8.5&os=android&udid=3d3ec742930b635fc4c61f0575dbc4d2939edbe2&appverion=508500&ch=blf1298_10928_001&session_id=153F4EEE16F56A43FD63ZD21B866413ED9BE044EFB876A115C62DBED82EE4C824D&dzh=1&scp=0&appid=10001&utype=0&rtype=2&pushid=7b4aaf1210a5bdbac3cea26d5030a419&ptype=5&gender=1&userInitPay=3&birt=1706674841000&instime=${t}&instId=${t}&chType=6&bidType=0&recSw=1&appType=0&pr=-1.0&tm=0&ac=999&gid=${gid}&nid=${nid}&sort=${s}&gsort=0&sgsort=0&sequence=1&chapter_name=${c}&snk=${snk}`;
java.ajax(url)
</js>$.content<js>
function a(str) {
	str = String(str);
	length = str.length / 2;
	bArr = [];
	for (i = 0; i < length; i++) {
		i2 = i * 2;
		bArr[i] =  intToByte(parseInt(str.substring(i2, i2 + 2), 16));
  }
  return bArr;
}
function intToByte(i) {
	var b = i & 0xFF;var c = 0;
	if (b >= 128) {c = b % 128;c = -1 * (128 - c);}
	else {c = b;}
	return c;
}

 function byteToHexString(arr) {
    return arr.reduce((accu, item) => {
        let a =(item&0xff).toString(16)
        if (a.length ==1) a = "0" + a
        return accu += a
    }, "")
  }
  function hextoBase64(t) {
	function parse(t) {
		t = String(t)
		for (var e = t.length, r = [], i = 0; i < e; i += 2){
		r[i >>> 3] |= parseInt(t.substr(i, 2), 16) << 24 - i % 8 * 4;
		}
		return r;
	}
	function stringify(t) {
		var e = t
		, r = 4 * t.length
		, i = "ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZabcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456789+/=";
		for (var n = [], o = 0; o < r; o += 3){
		    for (var s = (e[o >>> 2] >>> 24 - o % 4 * 8 & 255) << 16 | (e[o + 1 >>> 2] >>> 24 - (o + 1) % 4 * 8 & 255) << 8 | e[o + 2 >>> 2] >>> 24 - (o + 2) % 4 * 8 & 255, a = 0; a < 4 && o + .75 * a < r; a++){
			n.push(i.charAt(s >>> 6 * (3 - a) & 63));}
		}
		var c = i.charAt(64);
		if (c){
		   for (; n.length % 4; ){
			      n.push(c);}
		}
		return n.join("")
	}
	return stringify(parse(t));
}

sf = "DES/CBC/PKCS5Padding";
d=hextoBase64(byteToHexString(a(result)));
key = iv = "EaSoUcNt";
result=java.aesBase64DecodeToString(d,key,sf,iv);
</js>

ruleToc.chapterList:
<js>
var JsDom = Packages.org.jsoup.Jsoup;
var Document = Packages.org.jsoup.nodes.Document;
var Element = Packages.org.jsoup.nodes.Element;
            
var document = JsDom.parse(src);
            
// 获取包含<li>元素的<div>元素
var divs = document.select('ul.list > div');

// 将divs转换为数组以便排序
var divArray = [];
for (var i = 0; i < divs.size(); i++) {
    divArray.push(divs.get(i));
}

// 按照data-id属性对divArray进行排序
divArray.sort(function(a, b) {
    var pageA = parseInt(a.attr('data-id'), 10);
    var pageB = parseInt(b.attr('data-id'), 10);
    return pageA - pageB;
});

var list = [];
// 遍历排序后的divArray
for (var i = 0; i < divArray.length; i++) {
    var div = divArray[i];
    var dataId = div.attr('data-id');
    // 获取当前div下的所有<li>元素
    var lis = div.select('li');
    for (var j = 0; j < lis.size(); j++) {
        var li = lis.get(j);
        var a = li.select('a').first();
        if (a != null) {
            list.push({
                text: a.text(),
                id: dataId, // 使用data-id属性
                url: a.attr('href')
            });
        }
    }
}

//java.log(JSON.stringify(list));
list;
</js>

ruleContent.content: do{ t=Date();t1=Number(t.charAt(17));t2=Number(t.charAt(19));t3=Number(t.charAt(20));t4=Number(t.charAt(22));t5=Number(t.charAt(23)); //var t=new Date(); //year=t.getFullYear(); //java.log("🍊"+year); n=(t2+t4)%6*1000+t1*100+t3*10+t5; r=java.ajax("http://m.wufazhuce.com/article/"+n.toString()); java.setContent(r); } while(r.includes("404 Not Found")); //获取4个随机数其中第一个数小于6，大概大于5919无内容，并访问网址 chapter.title=java.getString('class.text-title@text'); chapter.url="http://m.wufazhuce.com/article/"+n.toString(); //传出标题 s=String(java.getString('class.text-content@html')); //获取正文内容 if(s.includes("]*src\=\"([^"]+?)(\?imageView[^"]+)?\"[^>]*>/g,'')} //判断正文是否有图片并处理 else if(s.includes("")){s=s.replace(//,"")} if(source.getVariable()<=0||source.getVariable()=="NaN"||book.variable==null){ book.variable=""; source.setVariable(39); } else{ source.setVariable(source.getVariable()-1); } book.variable+="\n★"+chapter.title+"\n"+s; book.variable;

ruleToc.chapterName:
text
@js:result
.replace("••","")
.replace(/^(\d+).第/,'第')
.replace(/^(正文|VIP章节|最新章节)?(\s+|_)|[\(\{（｛【].*[求含理更谢乐发推票盟补加字Kk\/].*/g,'')
.replace(/^(\d+)[、．]第.+章/,'第$1章')
.replace(/^(\d+)、\d+、/,'第$1章 ')
.replace(/^(\d+)、\d+/,'第$1章')
.replace(/^(第.+章)\s?\d+/,'$1')
.replace(/^(\d+)、/,'第$1章 ')
.replace(/^(第.+章)\s?第.+章/,'$1')
.replace(/第\s(.+)\s章/,'第$1章')
.replace(/.*(chapter|Chapter)\s?(\d+)\s?/,'$1 $2 ')
.replace(/\(.+\)/,'')
.replace(/\[|。/,'')
.replace(/^(第)?([零一二两三四五六七八九十百千]+).+第/,'第')
.replace(/第([零一二两三四五六七八九十百千]+)章/g,java.toNumChapter(result))
##(章)([^\s]+)(\s·)##$1 $2$3
